title: The Sacrifice
overview: Faisal lives happily with his daughter and his mother as a single father. He is very serious about work when it is time, and his whole life is based on his daughter. However, when a new employee named Ayitr (Srabonti) joins the company, she not only gets close to his daughter but also towards Faisal's heart.
